prompt: Slow cinematic close-up: a spoon lifting fluffy ribbons of taro bingsu shaved ice from a speckled ceramic bowl. Condensed milk drips slowly. Warm cream background, soft window light. Editorial food video.
Slow cinematic close-up: barista pouring milk into espresso, creating a rosetta art pattern. Mid-pour, milk fold visible, steam rising. Warm wood counter, soft morning light. Editorial cafe video.

Slow cinematic shot of a Watermelon Breeze drink in a tall glass — condensation droplets running down the glass, watermelon wedge garnish, ice cubes settling slightly. Marble cafe table, soft natural light.
Slow cinematic close-up of bao buns on a bamboo steamer — gentle steam rising, soft and fluffy texture, crispy chicken filling glistening with sauce. Warm cafe background.
